description: A designed news-headline social card (Fox News style) overlaid on a nighttime photograph. The photo shows a bearded man (Senator Markwayne Mullin) in a light gray polo shirt and dark puffer vest bearing a U.S. Department of Homeland Security patch, speaking outdoors at night, partly turned toward an out-of-focus interviewer at left; a red/orange emergency light glows behind him and faint figures and a parking sign are visible in the dark background. Centered over the lower portion is the white 'FOX NEWS' logo, and beneath it a large bold white serif headline: 'Mullin rips Spanberger for 'criminalizing' DHS while ICE arrests illegal alien felon in her 'sanctuary' state'. A small DHS seal sits at the very bottom. The dark, dramatic lighting and authoritative news branding lend urgency. This is a retweet of DHS framing Virginia 'sanctuary' politicians as protecting criminals while ICE protects Americans. Messaging technique: amplifying a sympathetic Fox News headline to attack sanctuary policies and Democratic politicians. Target audience: general public / supporters of stricter immigration enforcement.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Mullin rips Spanberger for 'criminalizing' DHS while ICE arrests illegal alien felon in her 'sanctuary' state
